text: Invalid fixture: single-domain IoT scenario must not request an FMSR tool.
characteristic_form: This fixture should fail because expected_tools includes a cross-domain tool.

text: Negative fixture: declared multi-domain scenario with mismatched tool coverage.
characteristic_form: Should fail validator because domain tags and expected tools do not agree.

text: Invalid fixture: Multi scenario must cover at least two domains.
characteristic_form: This fixture should fail because Multi scenarios need multiple domain tags.
success_criteria: validator rejects Multi scenarios with only one domain tag

text: Invalid fixture: FMSR scenario must use matching domain_tags.
characteristic_form: This fixture should fail because type and domain_tags disagree.
success_criteria: validator rejects mismatched type and domain_tags

text: Negative fixture: references a nonexistent WO tool.
characteristic_form: Should fail validator because expected_tools contains a non-canonical tool name.
